relaxation.name: Relaxation
relaxation.description: Helps you fall asleep, reduces anxiety, calms the nervous system.

anxiety_relief.name: Anxiety Relief
anxiety_relief.description: Exhale is longer than inhale — stabilizes breathing and reduces stress.

concentration.name: Concentration
concentration.description: "Box breathing" — helps to focus and stay calm.

balance.name: Balance
balance.description: Even breathing — harmonizes the heart and brain, stabilizes the rhythm.

energy.name: Energy
energy.description: Short, active exhales — activate the body and clear the mind.

irritation_release.name: Irritation Release
irritation_release.description: Helps to get rid of anger — long exhale with a soft sound.

creative_flow.name: Creative Flow
creative_flow.description: A gentle rhythm for a flow state — supports attention without tension.

message.select_new_practice: When needed, select a new breathing practice:
message.feedback: 💬 Feedback To send me a private message, just click on this link: Write a private message I look forward to your questions or suggestions!
